notFound.title: Content not found
notFound.description: This content may have been deleted or the link is invalid.

header.cloudPlaybackNotice: {{source}} playback is active. Sentence-level highlighting is estimated, so it will feel less precise than browser word highlighting.

normal.label: Normal
normal.description: Read along with the transcript while the audio plays.

repeat.label: Repeat
repeat.description: Loop the current sentence until it feels easy.

hide-text.label: Hide text
hide-text.description: Listen first, then reveal the transcript only when you need it.

dictation.label: Dictation
dictation.description: Type what you hear and turn misses into targeted retry.

hidden.title: Transcript hidden
hidden.description: Keep listening first and reveal the text only when you want a check.
hidden.transcriptHidden: Transcript is hidden for this mode.
hidden.keepListening: Use play, previous, and next to keep working from audio.

dictation.title: Sentence dictation
dictation.failedHint: This sentence will be added to weak spots so you can retry it later.
dictation.weakSpotReason: Dictation accuracy was {{accuracy}}% on the latest attempt.

errors.ttsFailed: Voice synthesis failed. Please try again or switch to a different voice source.
